THE WORLD FESTIVAL OF PLAY

One arena. Four houses. Every kind of game.

Meta Games is where esports, sport, and strategy share the same floor. Thousands of young competitors walk in as strangers and walk out wearing one of four colors — for keeps.

Claim a Seat See the Format

Countries represented

HOST CITY · 2026

Manila lights the arena this year.

A skyline built for a festival this size — GAWSF and the host federation have cleared three venues across the city for eleven days of competition.

WHY WE BUILT IT

Every great match starts as an idea scribbled on a wall.

Meta Games began as a question: why do we ask kids to choose between the chess club, the track team, and the gaming lounge? The best young competitors don't specialize that early — they explore. So we built one festival where a sprinter can also run a strategy bracket, and a strategist can also learn to read a defense.

Four houses, one shared crest, and a schedule that lets every kind of player find their game — that's the whole idea.

THE FOUR HOUSES

The four colors on our crest are your team.

Every competitor is sorted into a house on day one. It's the color you wear, the section you sit in, and the name the whole arena chants when your event goes to the wire.

House Emerald

Endurance and steady nerve. Emerald wins the events that take all day.

House Cobalt

Strategy and focus. Cobalt reads the board three moves ahead of everyone else.

House Solaris

Speed and spark. If it's decided in the last thirty seconds, it's Solaris's stage.

House Ember

Power and heart. Ember plays loud, plays physical, and never backs down first.

THREE ARENAS, ONE FESTIVAL

Pick your discipline. Or don't — play all three.

Points earned anywhere on the floor count toward the same house scoreboard, so a strong chess run can still swing the arena's final medal count.

Arena & Reality

Full-immersion VR and AR esports brackets, staged live on the main floor for the crowd to watch move by move.

Court & Field

Traditional team sport tournaments — basketball, track, and relay events — run house-versus-house all festival long.

Mind & Strategy

Chess, debate, and tabletop strategy brackets for competitors who'd rather out-think the clock than beat it.

POWERED BY TECH

Every rep, every rally, every round — tracked.

Wearables log vitals for the fitness events while AR overlays call the shots in real time for referees and broadcast alike, so no close call ever gets waved off.

WHO SHOWS UP

Built for every kind of player, from every kind of place.

Sixty-one countries send delegations. Every house has an adaptive bracket, a language desk, and a seat held open for whoever's ready to play.

HOW WE BUILD IT

Every festival is co-built with local schools and federations.

Meta Games doesn't parachute in. Each host city's education boards, sport federations, and gaming leagues help set the bracket, staff the arena, and pick the venue — so the festival looks like the community running it.

Become a host partner →

Sanctioned by the Global Alliance of World Sports Federations.

Every bracket, referee certification, and medal count at Meta Games is reviewed and signed off by GAWSF, so results carry weight back home — on a transcript, a ranking, or a federation roster.

Your house is waiting.

Registration closes once each house fills its roster. Fill in your delegation's paperwork, pick your discipline, and find out which color you're wearing.
